features.title: Brand Value
features.description:
* Affordable elegance to premium luxury - all under one roof
* Blending tradition with modern style

about: At Shree Advaya Studio, every saree is carefully selected to reflect understated luxury, superior craftsmanship, and enduring beauty. Our collections seamlessly blend tradition with contemporary grace, designed for women who appreciate elegance that transcends trends.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: THERE MIGHT BE MILD COLOUR VARIATION IN THE PRODUCT DUE TO COLOUR REPRODUCTION IN CAMERA AND SCREEN.

shipping.title: Shipping & Delivery
shipping.content: PAN INDIA FREE SHIPPING CHARGES APPLY FOR ORDERS ABOVE 999/-

returns.title: Return & Exchange Policy
returns.content:
RETURNS AND REFUNDS NOT ACCEPTED SUBJECT TO THE FOLLOWING TERMS AND CONDITIONS: 
•	EXCHANGE REQUESTS TO BE RAISED WITHIN 48 HOURS OF DELIVERY.
•	EXCHANGE REQUESTS ARE ACCEPTED ONLY IN CASE OF MANUFACTURING DEFECTS OR WRONG PRODUCT DELIVERY.
•	PRODUCT MUST BE UNUSED, UNWASHED, WITH TAGS INTACT.
•	CUSTOMERS MUST SHARE UNBOXING VIDEO AS PROOF FOR EXCHANGE REQUESTS.
•	EXCHANGE SUBJECT TO STOCK AVAILABILITY, IF NOT WILL BE REFUNDED.
•	SHIPPING CHARGES APPLY FOR EXCHANGES TO BE BORNE BY CUSTOMERS.
